name: Potential Connection to a Known Botnet CandC
notes: This rule triggers when the system detects a potential connection to a Botnet command and control host.
conditions_text: when the context is Local to Remote
when the destination IP is a part of any of the following BOT.BOT_Control
when the destination port is one of the following 25, 53
TD_list: APPLY Potential Connection to a Known Botnet CandC on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the context is Local to Remote
AND when the destination IP is a part of any of the following BOT.BOT_Control
AND NOT when the destination port is one of the following 25, 53
RED_list: Event name: Communication to a known Bot Command and Control
Event description: Local host attempting to communicating with a known botnet command and control channel.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
